name: PURE BIOSCIENCE, INC.
summary: PURE BIOSCIENCE, INC. develops and commercializes proprietary antimicrobial products based on patented stabilized ionic silver technology, specifically Silver Dihydrogen Citrate (SDC). Key products include PURE Hard Surface, an EPA-registered food contact surface sanitizer and disinfectant for restaurant chains, food processors, and transportation companies, and PURE Control, a direct food contact processing aid. SDC is also supplied as a raw material for personal care products. Products are sold directly and through third-party distributors.

products.name: PURE Hard Surface
products.description: EPA-registered, patented SDC-based ready-to-use hard surface disinfectant and food contact surface sanitizer with bacterial and viral kill times as fast as 30 seconds.

products.name: PURE Control
products.description: SDC-based direct food contact processing aid seeking FDA and USDA regulatory approvals for use in food processing operations.

products.name: SDC Concentrate
products.description: Varying strengths of Silver Dihydrogen Citrate concentrate supplied as a raw material additive for personal care and other products.

partnerships.description: Company relies on a third-party manufacturer to produce SDC-based products, over whom it has limited control.
Products sold through expanding third-party distribution network to access new markets and customer segments.
Partners with third parties seeking approvals to market SDC-based products outside the U.S.
